who: procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies processing 10-20 invoices/week
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized retail companies processing 10-20 invoices/week, inconsistent supplier performance tracking causes late orders and missed discounts. We automate scorecard generation and email updates instead of manual scorecard creation and email updates.
problem: Inconsistent supplier performance tracking leads to late orders and missed discounts.
